untranslatable_reason: The 'Three Stars in the South' candlestick pattern cannot be expressed using the allowed indicators and operators. This pattern requires specific visual/morphological identification of three consecutive candlesticks with precise wick and body relationships that are not available in the indicator set. The source text also explicitly states that candle patterns and their performance metrics are not measured by standard technical indicators. Pattern recognition would require a dedicated candle_pattern indicator or machine learning classification not available in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Signal specifies a candlestick pattern requiring visual pattern identification. While direction (LONG in bear market reversal) and target regime (BEAR_MARKET) are clear, the actual pattern detection logic cannot be implemented with the allowed indicators.
